channel.title: Generative AI on MoiSoto's Dev Corner
channel.description: Recent content in Generative AI on MoiSoto's Dev Corner

item.title: WWDC26 Resources
item.description:
WWDC 2026 is over! This year is all about Apple Intelligence.
I created a Gist with my favorite resources from the conference.

Click here if you want to Star or Follow the Gist:

WWDC 2026 Resources · GitHub.

or check below for the embedded version…

item.title: Generative AI Resources
item.description:
Recently I’ve been working on some projects related to Generative AI models. The more I dive into this, the more I realize the vast amount of resources available.

This article will host a Gist that will be updated (hopefully frequently) with the most interesting resources I come across.

Click here if you want to Star or Follow the Gist:

Generative AI Resources · GitHub.

or check below for the embedded version…
